Walton County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Walton County, Florida

FHA loans across Walton County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, where FHA fits between the 30A beaches and inland towns, and how to get pre-approved.

Walton County Home Loans

FHA loans in Walton County, Florida

Walton County spans two very different worlds: the ultra-premium beach communities along Scenic Highway 30A, and the far more affordable inland towns of DeFuniak Springs and fast-growing Freeport. That split defines FHA here — the luxury 30A market is largely beyond FHA's reach, but inland Walton County offers genuine value well within the loan limit.

Walton County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Walton County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Walton County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). That covers most inland Walton County homes; the premium 30A beach market generally exceeds it. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Walton County's exact figure with HUD.

30A luxury vs. affordable inland Walton

The 30A corridor's beach homes are some of the priciest in Florida and typically exceed FHA limits, but inland Freeport and DeFuniak Springs offer new and existing homes within reach — great for first-time buyers. Freeport in particular has booming new construction that passes the FHA appraisal easily. For any condos, confirm FHA approval via our condo guide.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Walton County

We help FHA buyers throughout Walton County, including DeFuniak Springs, Freeport, and the Santa Rosa Beach (30A) area. Wherever you are in the county, we will explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment, and get you pre-approved fast. Start with our first-time buyer guide or estimate your payment with the FHA calculator.

Down payment help in Walton County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Walton County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Walton County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Walton County for 2026?+
Walton County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most inland homes. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Can I use FHA on 30A in Walton County?+
The premium 30A beach market generally exceeds FHA limits, but FHA works well in inland Walton County, including Freeport and DeFuniak Springs.
Does FHA work for new-construction homes in Freeport?+
Yes — Freeport's booming new construction typically passes the FHA appraisal easily and sits within the loan limit.
How much down payment do I need in Walton County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Walton County?+
Yes — DeFuniak Springs, Freeport, the Santa Rosa Beach (30A) area, and every community in the county.
